s: In 2015, Andrew Bellatti suited up for TBR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.310, WHIP 1.110, SO 18, WAR -0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (TBR -> MIA).

Changed teams after the previous season (MIA -> PHI).
